text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Summer camp is coming to an end. We've become
a truly formidable team as we relaxed over the
summer.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I nervously check in on Super Creek. I wonder
how she feels now.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Hmm, I can't quite explain it... I feel like... a
bone's been dislodged.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
Yeah! Like a fish bone that's been stuck in your
throat for who knows how long.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: And with the bone now gone, I feel amazing.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: I think I'll be okay, but even if I'm not...

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
I have my loyal trainer here to support me!
Hehe! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It looks like everything's worked out. She might
be in tip-top shape again.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text: Shall we go back then, Trainer?

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
No, to our former selves when we debuted
together—to when we didn't have a care in the
world.

text_block_list.name: Super Creek
text_block_list.text:
The Classics... They're still out there, waiting to
be conquered, right?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's right. We still have time.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
As long as we can make the Kikuka Sho, I know
that Super Creek can prove to everyone what
she's truly made of.
